subtitles.original: Oh! You woke up!
subtitles.english: Oh! You woke up!

subtitles.original: Hi, good morning~
subtitles.english: Hi, good morning~

subtitles.original: Did you have a good sleep?
subtitles.english: Did you have a good sleep?

subtitles.original: Oh, here?
subtitles.english: Oh, here?

subtitles.original: This is my room!
subtitles.english: This is my room!

subtitles.original: What was that?
subtitles.english: What was that?

subtitles.original: It looks a bit different?
subtitles.english: It looks a bit different?

subtitles.original: Ehehe~ I guess you found out.
subtitles.english: Ehehe~ I guess you found out.

subtitles.original: I... prepared this room...
subtitles.english: I... prepared this room...

subtitles.original: ...just for us! 'Cause it's a special room!
subtitles.english: ...just for us! 'Cause it's a special room!

subtitles.original: Yeah, I wanted to make our memory as special as possible.
subtitles.english: Yeah, I wanted to make our memory as special as possible.

subtitles.original: So I worked really hard and I prepared the perfect scenery just for us.
subtitles.english: So I worked really hard and I prepared the perfect scenery just for us.

subtitles.original: I even transported you here while you were still asleep.
subtitles.english: I even transported you here while you were still asleep.

subtitles.original: I just didn't want you to be tired, that's all.
subtitles.english: I just didn't want you to be tired, that's all.

subtitles.original: I just love you so much that I want these feelings to properly reach you.
subtitles.english: I just love you so much that I want these feelings to properly reach you.

subtitles.original: Huh? What's wrong?
subtitles.english: Huh? What's wrong?

subtitles.original: I'm not like my usual self?
subtitles.english: I'm not like my usual self?

subtitles.original: Hehe~ You're so silly.
subtitles.english: Hehe~ You're so silly.

subtitles.original: I have no idea what you're talking about.
subtitles.english: I have no idea what you're talking about.

subtitles.original: Eh! Wait!
subtitles.english: Eh! Wait!

subtitles.original: Don't go!
subtitles.english: Don't go!

subtitles.original: Where are you going?
subtitles.english: Where are you going?

subtitles.original: Wow, I can't believe you ran away like that.
subtitles.english: Wow, I can't believe you ran away like that.

subtitles.original: But you were so cute when you were so shy!
subtitles.english: But you were so cute when you were so shy!

subtitles.original: 死ぬのがいいわ
subtitles.english: I'd rather die
